arts.ttl: Premier League boss spots 'brilliant' Newcastle United sign vs Liverpool, Arsenal and Chelsea
arts.sum: Thomas Frank has predicted that Newcastle United will provide the 'biggest test' that his Brentford side have faced at home so far this season. Brentford have won six of their seven top-flight fixtures at the Gtech this season, drawing the other, and Frank's team have averaged more than three goals per game on home soil.

arts.ttl: 'Start showing some consistency!' - Eddie Howe sent Newcastle United verdict after Liverpool draw - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Eddie Howe's Newcastle United demonstrated their tenacity against a strong Liverpool, ensuring the match was an unforgettable experience for the fans. BigW comments: "Great result, Liverpool top top side and we gave them a hell of a game, draw probably a fair result Wish we could play with that intensity every game, the difference in squad quality is so obvious looking at the subs.

arts.ttl: Unseen Howe reaction seconds before Liverpool disaster as Newcastle bounce back
arts.sum: While the Amazon Prime cameras were focused on the closing stages of Newcastle United vs Liverpool at St James' Park, Magpies boss Eddie Howe could be seen fretting over the very real prospect of his side undoing all their hard work for the third time in Wednesday's 3-3 draw with the Reds. A mere few moments earlier, Mohamed Salah had just seen his close-range shot cannon back off the crossbar as the away side looked to take the lead for the first time.

arts.ttl: Brentford vs Newcastle predictions: Bees can make home advantage count
arts.sum: Gareth Freeman thinks in-form Newcastle could be set for another difficult afternoon in the capital when they head to Brentford on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Virgil van Dijk discovers FA punishment fate after Anthony Gordon incident
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk was involved in an off-the-ball incident with Newcastle United's Anthony Gordon on Wednesday night during the 3-3 draw at St James' Park
